description: Image credits from The Medium is the Massage (1967), transcribed from PDF page 84 (book pages 158-159). Keyed by book page number(s). Use this to populate the source_credit field in the analysis schema.
note_page_1: Page 1: A trademark is printed on a raw egg yolk by a no-contact, no-pressure printing technique. Imagine the possibilities to which this device will give birth!
